posts.author: joycewong (Joyce Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When creating a form for a board, I would like to use the current logic feature but for subitems.

What are you trying to achieve

I have different types of subitem, it would be great if form logic could should different questions depending on which type of subitems they want.

posts.author: nataliecanestro (Natalie Canestro)
posts.cookedHtml: A vertical return of data would be very helpful, where the subitem is the question asked in the form, and the columns on the subitems are the responses. This makes data so much easier to view when reviewing answers. The system cannot take data from items and push it into specific subitems, so a vertical representation on the board is not an option that way either. I have two boards where I have 25+ data points I need to collect via a form, and our team must gather them at the item level in columns, open up the workforms submission on one screen, the board subitems on another screen, then rate and make notes based on the answers in the item columns. This is not nearly as efficient as it would be to use the subitem name column for questions on the form.
